summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed via the `isOrderConfirmed` state flag and `showQRSection` logic that gates the QR code section behind the order confirmation action. REQ-2 is addressed via `handleConfirmPaymentReceived` which clears localStorage, resets cart state via `onClearOrder()`, and reloads the page. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: Automatic order expiry/cancellation after 1 hour using a payment timer hook (usePaymentTimer), with a countdown, expiry toast, and auto-cancellation of the order when the timer runs out.
hallucinated_features.reason: Neither REQ-1 nor REQ-2 mention a payment timer, countdown, or automatic order expiry mechanism. The build request explicitly lists 'Real-time payment status polling' as a non-goal and does not request any timer-based cancellation.

hallucinated_features.description: Session persistence of an active awaiting-payment order across page reloads via localStorage (loadActiveOrder, saveActiveOrder), so the QR section re-appears on reload if a pending order exists.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not require session persistence of the payment state across reloads. REQ-1 only requires the QR to appear after confirmation within the same session flow, and REQ-2 requires clearing all state on payment confirmation. The automatic re-display of QR from a stored pending order was not requested.
